title: Senior Marketing Analyst (all genders)
summary: Strong conceptual fit in funnel/cohort analytics and BI reporting, but critical gaps in SQL, Python/R, and app/web tracking make this a stretch for the senior-level technical bar.
key_requirements: 5+ years experience as Marketing Analyst / Growth Analyst / BI Analyst (required)
BI tools: Looker, Tableau, or Power BI (required)
Web and app marketing tracking: GA, event tracking, attribution (required)
Python and/or R for advanced analysis and forecasting (required)
Deep understanding of Growth and Performance Marketing (Paid, CRM, Lifecycle) (required)
English — very good written and spoken (required)
Experience in data-driven scale-up / digital / tech environment (bonus)
matched_skills: KPI framework design and dashboard development
missing_skills: SQL (not listed in tools or experience)
App event tracking and tracking setup ownership
5+ years in a dedicated analytics role (candidate has ~4 years mixed marketing + analytics)
Looker (enterprise) — candidate has Looker Studio only
Scale-up or consumer tech/dating-app domain experience
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Power BI certification and dashboard ownership at HSBC (budget variance, burn-rate reports to C-suite)
Emphasise A/B testing and experiment design experience from CV
Lead with cohort analysis, funnel analytics, and attribution work across multiple roles
Frame Hapag-Lloyd funnel and behavioural analysis as growth analytics experience
Mention Qlik Sense and SAP Analytics to broaden BI tool breadth
If any SQL or Python exposure exists (even coursework), surface it explicitly
location_notes: Hamburg / Dresden / Berlin — candidate based in Luneburg, Hamburg is commutable
risk_flags: SQL is listed as 'sehr gute Kenntnisse' required — no SQL evidence in CV is a hard blocker
Python/R required for modelling and forecasting — not evidenced in CV
Role title is Senior with 5+ year requirement — candidate experience level may not meet bar
App marketing tracking ownership not evidenced — key technical requirement for this team
